description: session-list --all-cwds --include-stale surfaces a 6-year-old row with deterministic output (timestamps in the far past always bin as 'stale' regardless of wall clock)
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('/tmp/fixture-cwd', 'ghost', 'claude', 'peer', 'ghost-sess-001', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z');
